scripts.test:ga-gates: BARDO_STRICT_CANONICAL_MODE=true "${npm_execpath:-bun}" test src/app/routes/turns-orchestrator.handler.test.ts src/mcp/tools/player-action/register.test.ts src/mcp/tools/world-sync/register.test.ts src/mcp/tools/simulation-tick.test.ts src/mcp/tools/consistency-check.test.ts src/mcp/evals/golden-scenarios.test.ts src/mcp/evals/long-run-campaign-stability.test.ts
scripts.ga:readiness: "${npm_execpath:-bun}" run check && "${npm_execpath:-bun}" test && "${npm_execpath:-bun}" run test:ga-gates && "${npm_execpath:-bun}" run test:soak-gates && "${npm_execpath:-bun}" run test:mechanics-edge-gates && "${npm_execpath:-bun}" run test:perf-gates
scripts.check: "${npm_execpath:-bun}" run lint && "${npm_execpath:-bun}" run typecheck && "${npm_execpath:-bun}" run validate:env
